one_time_description: Province of BC Peerless Road Development Grant received $4,000,000 recorded as deferred revenue; also Specific Claims revenue of $429,118 received in 2024
economic_notes: 1252729 B.C. Ltd. incorporated June 3, 2020 to hold acquired land on behalf of the First Nation. Transmountain Accommodation revenue of $1,360,879 is a significant revenue source. Specific Claims revenue of $429,118 received in 2024.
notes: Deferred revenue increased significantly to $6,395,343 from $1,891,450 primarily due to $4,000,000 Province of BC Peerless Road Development Grant received but not yet recognized. Subsidiary 1252729 B.C. Ltd. is consolidated. No long-term debt. Schedule 1 (detailed expense breakdown) and Schedule 2 (contingent assets) referenced but detailed expense by program not visible in provided pages. Total government transfers estimated from ISC ($427,761) + Province of BC ($180,987) + DFO ($117,926) + Parks Canada ($109,660) + First Nations Health Authority ($10,000) + Children and Family Development ($115,800) + Coast Salish Employment & Training ($82,111) + Guardian Program ($2,000) + H'ulh'etun Health Society ($1,175) + Hul'qumi'num Treaty Group ($244,950) + Kw'umut Lelum ($72,783) + Declaration Act ($260,000) - some items may be non-government. Trust Fund member distributions of $33,200 included in 2024 expenditures.
